case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR. VS. ROCIO ALVARADO CASTILLO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, ROCIO ALVARADO $1,969.41 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,059.41, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
